name: sound_generate
description: Generate speech audio from text using OpenAI or MiniMax TTS.
description_for_agent: Generate speech audio from text. Returns an audio_url you can include in your response. Parameters: text (string, required, max 10000 chars), voice (string, optional — provider-specific voice name), provider (string, optional: 'openai' or 'minimax', uses system default if omitted). OpenAI voices: alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer. MiniMax voices: male-qn-qingse, female-shaonv, female-yujie, etc. Use this skill when the user asks you to read something aloud, generate speech, or create audio.

text.description: Text to convert to speech (max 10000 chars)

provider.description: TTS provider: openai or minimax (optional, uses system default)
